response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and technologies, with notable open-source contributions and infrastructure fluency, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year trajectory expected for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions with real-world impact (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor others through workshops and tooling
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience shown
Role requires 15 years of engineering experience — timeline is ambiguous due to overlapping roles and freelance work
Lacks demonstrable expertise in AI-powered product development or direct engagement with cloud AI services
